$comment: Documented exceptions for scripts/ci-audit-gate.mjs. The gate BLOCKS on any critical, and on any high-severity advisory whose package is NOT listed here. Each entry must carry a real reason and a reviewBy date; an expired entry FAILS the gate so the list cannot rot silently. Moderates/lows are tracked (printed) but non-blocking. Revisit and shrink this list whenever upstream ships a fix.

allow.reason: SheetJS prototype-pollution + ReDoS, no upstream fix available on the npm distribution. Only reachable by parsing an attacker-controlled spreadsheet; the xlsx skill processes user-provided files locally, never untrusted network input. Track SheetJS for a patched npm release or migrate to the vendor CDN build.

Prometheus exporter process crash via malformed HTTP request. Fix requires @opentelemetry/sdk-node@0.219.0 (semver-major across the whole otel stack) — deferred to a dedicated, test-gated bump. Observability is opt-in (OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT / SENTRY_DSN) and the Prometheus endpoint is not exposed by default, so the DoS surface is off unless a user wires it to untrusted traffic.
Same advisory as @opentelemetry/sdk-node (GHSA-q7rr-3cgh-j5r3); cleared by the same deferred semver-major otel bump. Opt-in observability, exporter off by default.

Dev-only: pulled transitively by semantic-release / @actions release tooling (node-gyp, @semantic-release/github). Not in the production runtime dependency tree; runs only in CI release jobs. Parent pins the version so a direct bump is not in range.
